title: Audio Player Fixed Group
description: An Audio Player Group can be used to combine multiple Audio Player blocks. This allows for a uniform music experience in open spaces.

inputs.description: Increase volume by value set in parameter (Vsts). Double-click selects next favorite.
Decrease volume by value set in parameter (Vsts). Double-click turns off the player.
If the assigned Audio Players are set to different volumes, only the loudest players adopt the new value when the volume is changed; all other players follow accordingly but retain the volume ratio.
Selects a favorite based on its assigned ID number. If the selected ID does not exist, the first favorite is selected.
Plays alarm sound at volume set in parameter (Va).
Plays fire alarm sound at volume set in parameter (Va).
Plays doorbell sound at volume set in parameter (Vbell).
Pulse: Outputs are reset / switched off. On: Block is locked. Dominating input.
Disables inputs V+, V-, V, Play, Pause, Prev, Next, Fav, Bell, Buzzer, T5, TTS, Cs, BTp when On. (e.g child lock, cleaning) Control via user interface is still possible.
As long as this input is active, any change in value at input (P) is ignored.

Button 2 : Volume up; double-click starts playback or choses next favorite Button 5 : Volume down; double-click pauses playback Button 3: Double-click activates (2C); triple-click activates (3C); (Roff) = 0: pauses playback
Converts a Text to speech and plays it at the volume set in parameter (Vtts).
Selects the Line In of an Audioserver as source based on its Line In ID.

Plays custom sound [filename] at volume [vol]. E.g. soundcheck.mp3:80 [filename]:[vol] Custom sounds have to be stored on the Audioserver’s SD card in the folder Event_Sounds! Only mp3 files are supported.

outputs.description: Intelligent API based connector. API Commands

parameters.description: Ignore Room Off / House Off via T5 (button 3)

As long as this input is active, bluetooth pairing is available. During this time all bluetooth-enabled Loxone devices can be paired with e.g. a smartphone or other bluetooth-enabled devices. Input is only visible when services and bluetooth are handled by player group This parameter is only visible in certain configurations.

properties.description: All selected function blocks can be controller together.
Enable AirPlay for all players of this group
Enable Spotify Connect for all players of this group
If services are handled by player group, the configured players are not visible in Airplay and Spotifiy connect.
If checked, the first room favorite will always be used when the player is activated.
